jobline.quoteDescription: RLQ306079 716477 70x110MM DESTINATION LABELS - 5 KINDS - BROADMEADOWS VIC
jobline.lineDescription: Size: 70mm x 110mm||Material: Semi Gloss Paper Permanent||Print Colour: CMYK||Tool: OS0023(6,4)(6,3)2mm Rectangle||Provided on 76mm Cores||Finishing: GLOSS VARNISH||HAND APPLIED||Supply: ROLLS OF 500||40 rolls (20,000) x SYD Destination Labels||20 rolls (10,000) x BNE Destination Labels||20 rolls (10,000) x NSW Country Labels||20 rolls (10,000) x PER Destination Labels||20 rolls (10,000) x ADL Destination labels||
jobline.deliveryToAddress: Allied Express Depot ||2 William Barak Boulevard ||Broadmeadows VIC 3047
